selections.name: LIVIN A SWEET LIFE
selections.reason: Excellent debut effort closing for second; draws the sweet spot post 6 and gets top billing.

selections.name: SHES GONE
selections.reason: Strong qualifier with a good closing kick; draws well and picks up the leading driver.

selections.name: LAINEY BLU
selections.reason: Flashed sub-27 closing speed in her recent qualifier; draws perfectly to be sent forward early.

selections.name: COLD CREEK COTIJA
selections.reason: Forgive the impossible parked-out trip last start; better post tonight gives her a chance to stick around.

danger_horse.name: CUPIDS SHADOW
danger_horse.reason: Class dropper who could factor if she overcomes the outside post.

selections.name: AVYANNA
selections.reason: Massive class drop from the F&M-Open; should be sent forward early and will be tough to catch on the engine.

selections.name: HORIZON SEELSTER
selections.reason: Very productive mare who gets a much better post tonight; likely sits the pocket behind the top choice.

selections.name: ONE LAST WISH
selections.reason: Another heavy class dropper from the Open ranks; draws well and commands respect at this level.

selections.name: CENTURY JAMILA
selections.reason: Racing well currently but struggles to win; rail draw could lead to a shuffle but she is an exotics factor.

danger_horse.name: VERITY BLUE CHIP
danger_horse.reason: Moving inside gives her a chance at a better trip to land in the bottom of the exotics.

selections.name: THE HITMAN HEART
selections.reason: Significant class drop from NW3 to NW2; game first-over winner at this level in April and powered home in 27.2 last out.

selections.name: A SPLASH OF GREEN
selections.reason: Grand Circuit talent getting the potent first-time McNair angle; capable of a big upset if she leaves hard.

selections.name: PUSH TO START
selections.reason: Logical contender off two solid qualifiers, but the wide draw is a concern given his lack of early gate speed.

selections.name: R HALO
selections.reason: Impressive maiden breaker last out but steps up to face tougher from the worst post.

danger_horse.name: PATS QUEEN
danger_horse.reason: Draws well and could grab a minor share if the pace collapses.

selections.name: DONTENVYME HANOVER
selections.reason: Expensive yearling who jogged in a qualifier; gets a massive driver upgrade to McNair and draws the sweet spot.

selections.name: HALL OF FEAR
selections.reason: Flew home in 26-flat in his debut; draws poorly but will be a massive threat if in striking distance late.

selections.name: SUNSET LOO
selections.reason: Solid second-place finish last out after an early move to the front; draws well and is a major player.

selections.name: TRAMONTO
selections.reason: Paced a 27-flat final quarter in OSS Grassroots company; rail draw should yield a good following trip for a slice.

danger_horse.name: D A BODACIOUS
danger_horse.reason: Showed sub-27 closing speed last out and draws well.

selections.name: KISSEDBYASTRANGER
selections.reason: Stakes-tested filly dropping into the NW1 class; showed an impressive wide brush last out and draws perfectly.

selections.name: UNA MOMENTA
selections.reason: Easy winner here two starts back; drops back into an easier spot and draws well to be a major threat.

selections.name: KEEPTHEHIFIVEALIVE
selections.reason: Dropped six seconds in her second start and paced home in 27.1; picks up McNair and offers value despite the 10-hole.

selections.name: ARTISTIC DELIGHT
selections.reason: Decent sophomore debut showing 27-speed early and late; should get a good trip near the front.

danger_horse.name: EMCEE
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a minor share if she avoids getting shuffled from the rail.

selections.name: LANESIDE INCONTROL
selections.reason: Gets needed class relief tonight; possesses the gate speed to secure top position and jogged last time at this level.

selections.name: MADRID A
selections.reason: Races best at this $20K claiming level; made a sustained middle move last week and draws perfectly tonight.

selections.name: KELLINA DIAMOND
selections.reason: Raced aggressively on the class drop last week; draws the sweet spot and should be part of the exotics.

selections.name: SILVER MAJESTY
selections.reason: Racing very well at the B-tracks; sharp mare who should be sent forward despite the outside post.

danger_horse.name: CHIEFS DREAM GIRL
danger_horse.reason: Draws well and could factor if the pace is hot.

selections.name: STEAMER
selections.reason: Raced okay one class higher before a sick scratch; McNair will likely send him early from the best post.

selections.name: BUCK DANCER
selections.reason: Raced better last week closing wide in a strange race; worth a shot in a wide-open field.

selections.name: TALK SHOW HOST
selections.reason: Winner at the bottom conditioned level recently; inside draw gives him a chance to work out a good trip.

selections.name: MY HOLY MOLEY
selections.reason: Closed well for third last week; will likely drop back and look to pass rivals late for an exotics share.

danger_horse.name: GREEN MONSTER
danger_horse.reason: Draws well and could sneak into the Superfecta at a price.

selections.name: MY ONLY SUNSHINE
selections.reason: Took a new lifetime mark two back; drops from the 10-hole to an inside post and gets top billing.

selections.name: ONLYTHEGOODDIYOUNG
selections.reason: Has been facing much tougher company; should improve by default on the class drop and draws perfectly.

selections.name: HP JOSEPHINE
selections.reason: Multi-level class drop last week yielded a good third; wide post helps her price in a winnable spot.

selections.name: WINDSUN CHARLOTTE
selections.reason: Capable of much better than she showed from the 10-hole last time; draws well and can hit the board.

danger_horse.name: GUCCI SEELSTER
danger_horse.reason: Draws the sweet spot and has back class to factor.

selections.name: EA BANK NOTE
selections.reason: Expensive yearling who showed sub-27 late zip in his sophomore debut; draws the best post and should be sent forward.

selections.name: NEVERLEAVEHARLAN
selections.reason: Strong closing effort in OSS Grassroots company last week; top threat if he gets better racing luck from the rail.

selections.name: ELLINGTON
selections.reason: Qualified well pacing home in 27-flat; will likely drop back and look to pass rivals late.

selections.name: SEABOARD
selections.reason: Inside draw gives him a chance to save ground and grab a minor award.

danger_horse.name: LOU WHO
danger_horse.reason: Nice closing effort at Flamboro; could sneak into the bottom of the exotics.

selections.name: MISTER MAGIC
selections.reason: Incredibly consistent veteran who fits perfectly here; should get a great trip on or near the lead.

selections.name: LIKE CHAOS
selections.reason: Dropped and popped last week with a perfect trip; possesses the gate speed to overcome the wide draw.

selections.name: SOUTHWIND RUSSIAN
selections.reason: Raced very well last week despite being parked forever; major threat if he can find a spot on the pylons.

selections.name: COOL CLIFFORD
selections.reason: Comes off his best effort of the season; fits well at this level and draws perfectly.

danger_horse.name: THE CANAM BANKER
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw could yield a ground-saving trip for a slice.

selections.name: TWIN B EMPRESS
selections.reason: First-over winner who paced to a season's best mark; jogged last week and draws the absolute best post tonight.

selections.name: CC ROCKIN ROSIE
selections.reason: Motored down the middle of the track for a driving away win last out; main danger despite stepping up a level.

selections.name: MADAM X
selections.reason: Victim of pace last out after being claimed; can go much better tonight starting from the rail.

selections.name: SUNSHINE MAGIC
selections.reason: Dropped to this level last week and was bet down; capable of much better and draws well.

danger_horse.name: STELLRMANIPULATION
danger_horse.reason: Comes off two good closing efforts at this level; merits a look for the bottom of the exotics.
